rule_hits.summary: Lists references cited in the paper, providing academic sources for related work and methodologies.
Reviews related work on fine-tuning LMs for tool use, in-context learning, and constrained decoding with finite-state machines, highlighting the limitations of these approaches...
Summarizes the benefits of TOOLDEC, noting its ability to improve LLM performance on tool use tasks and its potential societal impact in avoiding syntax errors.
